description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical metal head with a rounded ball-peen on one end and a flat striking face on the other. The head is securely mounted on a contoured wooden handle, which displays a natural wood grain and a slightly ergonomic shape for improved grip. The handle tapers gently towards the bottom, providing a comfortable hold for various hand sizes. The metal head has a smooth, slightly reflective finish, while the wooden handle appears matte and finely sanded. No visible branding, logos, or decorative markings are present on the hammer. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a smooth metal head and a contoured wooden handle, both in pristine condition. The hammer is unmarked and shows no visible signs of use.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed head-on from the flat striking face, showing the circular end of the metal head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the hammer, highlighting the cylindrical head with its ball-peen end and the gently curved wooden handle.
description_view_2: The hammer is seen from the ball-peen end, displaying the rounded metal surface and the handle's symmetry.
description_view_3: Another side profile, opposite to view 1, again showing the hammer's head and handle, with the ball-peen end on the left.
attribute_handle_type: Contoured wooden handle with a natural wood grain, slightly ergonomic and smooth, without visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with a flat striking face on one end and a rounded ball-peen on the other, both made of smooth steel.
